title: ANC - 5.-ANC is ON and User changes its value from Adaptive to Standard or vice versa during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: User switches ANC between Adaptive and Standard during an active call while Transparency Mode is OFF and remains inaccessible, then after the call ANC stays ON with the last selected value and Transparency remains OFF.
steps: Ensure ANC is ON and set to either Adaptive or Standard mode.
Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
Start or join an active call.
During the call, change the ANC value from Adaptive to Standard (or vice versa).
Verify that the user can switch between Adaptive and Standard modes while ANC remains ON.
Verify that Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible during the call.
After leaving the call, verify that ANC stays ON with the latest selected value.
After leaving the call, verify that Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected.
expected: The user can switch between Adaptive and Standard modes while ANC remains ON. Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible during the call. After leaving the call, ANC stays ON with the latest selected value and Transparency remains OFF with no value selected.
